message.description: Carries its own diagnosis discipline (e.g. divergence copy says check freshness FIRST).
message.title: Message

unacked.description: Pre-computed so the status strip never counts client-side.
unacked.title: Unacked

Attribution.description:
Why the ensemble disagrees with the market, one feature at a time, in
football language. delta_pp is signed percentage points toward `direction`.
Attribution.title: Attribution

already.description: True when idempotence made this a no-op (no new ledger entry).
already.title: Already

ledger_seq.description: Ledger seq of the appended command entry, if one was written.
ledger_seq.title: Ledger Seq

paused_tickers.description: ticker -> UTC ISO time it was paused.
paused_tickers.title: Paused Tickers

FairValueStep.description:
One step of the fair-value waterfall. Steps are ordered; value_after of
the last step IS the fair value - the decomposition must account for the
whole number or it is not a decomposition.

delta.description: Signed contribution; the first step's delta is the model prob itself.
delta.title: Delta

FairValueStep.title: FairValueStep

context.description: What was happening when this fill occurred.
context.title: Context

data_status.description: 'empty' = no ledger entries exist yet (definitive, not an error).
data_status.title: Data Status

killed.description: True when a kill command is in the ledger; re-arming is a CLI act.
killed.title: Killed

InternalViolation.description: Bracket-path product vs direct price, from the persisted joint draws.
InternalViolation.title: InternalViolation

reason.description: Ledgered verbatim; 'why' is part of the audit trail.
reason.title: Reason

has_more.description: True if the filter matched more rows than `limit`.
has_more.title: Has More

total_entries.description: Entries in the whole ledger, pre-filter.
total_entries.title: Total Entries

LineupStatus.description:
Lineup confirmation is the biggest single information event before
kickoff; the UI renders its arrival unmissably.

as_of.description: UTC ISO time this status was last checked.
as_of.title: As Of

confirmed_at.description: UTC ISO time official lineups were published, if they were.
confirmed_at.title: Confirmed At

LineupStatus.title: LineupStatus

MarketBaseline.description:
De-vigged 1X2 from the sharpest available book: the comparison line the
model board is judged against.

overround.description: Total implied prob before de-vig, e.g. 1.045.
overround.title: Overround

MarketBaseline.title: MarketBaseline

decomposition.description: Fair-value waterfall; the last step's value_after equals fair.p.
decomposition.title: Decomposition

edge_risk_adjusted.description: After-fee edge scaled by (1 - uncertainty); the board's ranking key.
edge_risk_adjusted.title: Edge Risk Adjusted

models.description: Per-model outputs; ensemble is NOT in this list.
models.title: Models

scoreline_matrix.description: Ensemble goals matrix [home][away]; sums to ~1 including the tail.
scoreline_matrix.title: Scoreline Matrix

contract.description: Which contract the series prices, e.g. 'home win'.
contract.title: Contract

weight.description: Ensemble weight in force for this market type; null for the market baseline row.
weight.title: Weight

active.description: False when paused or killed - quotes pulled.
active.title: Active

ProbWithBand.description: A probability may not travel without its uncertainty (ADR-0013).
ProbWithBand.title: ProbWithBand

config_hash.description: Content hash of the active AppConfig.
config_hash.title: Config Hash

data_as_of.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the newest underlying datum; null = no data yet.
data_as_of.title: Data As Of

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 time this response was assembled.
generated_at.title: Generated At

run_id.description: Run that produced the data, if any.
run_id.title: Run Id

source.description: 'real' = read from pipeline artifacts; 'mock' = generated placeholder.
source.title: Source

QuoteInputs.description:
The quote formula's INPUTS, not just its output (Avellaneda-Stoikov via
execution.quoting). The operator must see why the spread/skew is what it is.

skew.description: Reservation-price shift vs fair value (inventory shade).
skew.title: Skew

QuoteInputs.title: QuoteInputs

RunOut.description: A wc2026.runs.RunRecord as stored in the runs ledger, plus its chain position.
RunOut.title: RunOut

SettlementMapping.description:
The market's settlement text mapped to the model event it prices.
`confirmed=False` quarantines the contract: settlement-definition traps are
an edge CLASS, and an unreviewed mapping must be unactionable.
SettlementMapping.title: SettlementMapping

dependence_ratio.description: p / independent_product; the coherence edge lives in this ratio. Null if product is 0.
dependence_ratio.title: Dependence Ratio

independent_product.description: Product of the marginal probabilities - what naive multiplication says.
independent_product.title: Independent Product

p_advance.description: P(reaches the round of 32 by any path).
p_advance.title: P Advance

p_best_third_qualify.description: P(finishes 3rd AND advances among the 8 best thirds).
p_best_third_qualify.title: P Best Third Qualify

market.description: Market mid for the contract; null if no quote.
market.title: Market

tz.description: IANA zone of the venue, e.g. America/Mexico_City.
tz.title: Tz

get.description:
Clusters follow the fixtures (positions in the same match co-move);
targets come from the REAL convex optimizer on a mock covariance.

post.description:
Joint probability of arbitrary event combinations, COUNTED from the
persisted draws - never multiplied marginals. The dependence_ratio next to
the counted joint is the coherence edge made visible (ADR-0006).
